title: Bread And Cherries
content:
'Cherries, ripe cherries!'
        The old woman cried,
    In her snowy white apron,
        And basket beside;
    And the little boys came,
        Eyes shining, cheeks red,
    To buy a bag of cherries,
    To eat with their bread.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter De La Mare delivers a powerful performance in "Bread And Cherries"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
